description: You are a project architect at a small residential design firm. Prepare the garage floor plan at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf for permit submission by adding a professional title block. The title block must include a project title and address, a drawing number and sheet designation, a revision history section with at least one revision entry, a designated space for the architect's seal with appropriate text, and the drawing scale. Organize title block elements on dedicated layers and delineate the border with line entities forming a structured grid or frame. Save the completed drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_sheet.dxf.
